notes: Used (WINEPREFIX="<STEAM LIBRARY>steamapps/compatdata/8170/pfx" winecfg) and set the compatibility to Windows XP, yet still launches with just a black screen and hangs. Game is currently unplayable.

notes: Launcher pops up as a black screen.
title: Battlestations Pacific

notes: Attempted to use `PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%`, as well as `PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 %command%`; looked to see if there was potentially a beta that would help, but to no avail. Game *does* launch, however it just launches to a blackscreen and I have to SIGTERM the PID. I believe this is actually an issue with the game, and not proton- being I was unable to get the game to work in Windows.
title: Battlestations Pacific

notes:
One winecfg, must add bfp.exe and battlestationspacific.exe to WinXP. From there, you should receive a black screen. This is an issue for people on windows too, and this is no longer an issue with Proton... sort of. Proton should at least be able to replicate the black screen. Though, a fix to get this to continue to work is the following:
"
Make sure you have this installed

http://www.xbox.com/en-US/LIVE/PC/DownloadClient
